sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 61

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 61:1
items.html: (to the question) After the Nukva received the drop of the Zivug [coupling] of AB-SAG, which lowers the Hey Tachtona [lower Hey] from her Eynaim [eyes] and returns her AHP [Awzen, Hotem, Peh] to her degree, she too has acquired ten complete Kelim [vessels], like the level of ZA [Zeir Anpin]; therefore she clothes him along his whole level, at his back. (Item 109)
